sessions.summary: Repaired the diverged team-knowledge repo and reviewed C4C V3 doc changes
accomplishments: Fixed the diverged cdp-connectors-team-knowledge repo (stale index.lock + stuck rebase from a prior timed-out pull; the local commit was already upstream)

sessions.summary: Re-audit the C4C V3 DRAFT help docs to verify which filed comments the author applied, and draft the remaining doc changes
accomplishments: Re-audited all C4C V3 DRAFT help pages via two authenticated Playwright subagents; found 5 of 9 filed comments applied, 4 still absent

Confirmed still-absent: Relationship EVENT page relabeled '(Deprecated)' not deleted, still listed as child on Configure-the-Events, event count still '12' (should be 11), Adding-an-Application still single 'default' auth missing the Basic-auth-vs-listener-OAuth distinction, and the B2B scope note only a pending comment on the Case page

Verified per-activity B2B/B2C anchors from c4cV3-Connector.json: Email/Phone/Chat/Registered-Product = B2B+B2C, Lead/Opportunity/Appointment/Sales-Quote = B2B-only, Case = account.id + reporter.id (contact)
Drafted a doc message to Niels covering the per-activity B2B/B2C scope note plus an allowNulls-on-Create requirement (inboundNullHandling allowNulls for beforeImage:null)
nextSteps: Send the Niels doc message (B2B/B2C scope + allowNulls)
Ola/Niels to apply the 4 still-absent doc fixes

accomplishments: Merged (PR #44). Now cleanup: delete remote branch, sync master, restore your stashed whats-next.md.

sessions.summary: Verify and root-cause CDP error 400124 'Limit Reached' for callID testd7b4d78504045b89919fc95622399, and check the dataflow-cleanup flag
accomplishments: Root-caused error 400124 to CdpIDXService ValidateRestriction (licensed dataflow cap), correcting the original finding that blamed Gator and called it a rate/quota limit
Proved the 404 side-span is a normal idx_config/restriction fallback lookup (no per-partner override), not a downstream failure caused by the limit
Confirmed via Hades that partner 45575247 (test BU 4_4GbWZTHLVoqwj0ZXkUv7yQ, eu5) has exactly 5000 dataflows and 0 scheduling docs — orphaned UNIVERSE E2E profile-export flows
Found the documented cleanup (wiki GIGYA/3792914291): per-site CleanDataflows flag purging orphans older than 2 weeks on a 24h cycle
Determined CleanDataflows is NOT enabled: flag absent from all reachable config surfaces AND zero cleanup logs in 30 days across 124 indices
nextSteps: User to decide whether to enable CleanDataflows for site 107013844995
Durable fix: UNIVERSE E2E suite should tear down export dataflows after each run

sessions.summary: Build a per-session-name primer system so /clear gives a light-but-oriented fresh start, and update the /wrap reset step to offer /compact vs /clear
accomplishments: Reworked /wrap's final step from compact-only to a /compact-vs-/clear choice with an explainer, recommending /clear since durable state is already flushed
Built primer-loader.sh (SessionStart hook): injects ~/.claude/primers/<slug>.md on fresh/clear starts, skips auto-named sessions and --resume
Verified /clear fires SessionStart with source=clear in this build via a real-session diagnostic log line, then removed the log
Found and fixed the /rename divergence: it updates CLI state not $WT_SESSION.txt; /wrap now resolves the name from the system-reminder and writes it back
Added /wrap step 2f2 (Session Primer Merge) — curated in-place rewrite keyed on slugified display name
nextSteps: First live exercise: after this /wrap creates skills-engineering.md, run /clear and confirm the hook auto-reinjects it
